name: workspace
summary: Manages personal boards, orgs, teams, and members via workspace-api.ts (proxied to users-auth at /ws). State held in useWorkspace Zustand store. Org IDs persisted to localStorage for cross-session recall.
exposes: useWorkspace() → { boards, boardIds, orgs, orgIds, teams, members, ... all async actions }
key_notes: useWorkspace.init() fetches personal boards + all cached org details in parallel at app start.
Org IDs are saved to localStorage key 'gtc_org_ids' so known orgs survive page reload.
Team member key in store is '{orgId}:{teamId}' — composite key, not a nested object.
OrgPage is a stub — workspace features are partially implemented.
workspace-api base is '/ws' (proxied to :8080), distinct from auth-api base '/auth-api/v1/auth'.
